summary: Testing two critical bug fixes: 1) take-attendance page inline error handling (replaces window.alert), 2) course-lectures stats bar horizontal rendering. Both fixes verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bug fixes verified: 1) take-attendance.tsx now shows inline error with retry button instead of window.alert('لا توجد بيانات مخزنة') when API fails. The inline error includes error icon, title, message, retry button, and back button. 2) course-lectures.tsx stats bar renders horizontally with 4 columns (الكل, مجدولة, منعقدة, ملغاة) using inline styles for React Native Web compatibility. Month filter chips are visible and functional.

tests_performed.notes: Admin login with admin/admin123 works correctly

tests_performed.test: Course lectures stats bar - horizontal rendering
tests_performed.notes: Stats bar shows 4 columns horizontally: الكل (1), مجدولة (0), منعقدة (1), ملغاة (0)
Month filter visible with 'كل الأشهر' and 'فبراير (1)' chips styled correctly

tests_performed.test: Take-attendance page - successful load with lecture details
tests_performed.notes: Page loads with course name, date, time, room, student list, and attendance statuses
When API returns 403/404, shows inline error with: error icon, title 'تعذر تحميل البيانات', message, retry button 'إعادة المحاولة', and back button 'العودة للمحاضرات'. NO window.alert() used.
GET /api/lectures/{id}/details returns correct lecture info, course info, students with attendance status
